zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wadham於1429年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir John Wadham III28歲，母親Elizabeth Popham20歲。他於大約1471年與Elizabeth Stucley在英國戴文梅利費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年4月20日享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wadham于1429年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir John Wadham III28岁，母亲Elizabeth Popham20岁。他于大约1471年与Elizabeth Stucley在英国戴文梅利費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年4月20日享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文韋斯特 沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wadham was born in 1429, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Wadham III, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Popham, was 20. He married Elizabeth Stucley about 1471, in Merryfield, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 April 1502, at the age of 73, and was buried in West Worlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wadham est né en 1429, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wadham III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Popham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stucley environ 1471, à Merryfield, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1502, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à West Worlington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wadham 1429 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wadham III 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Popham 20. Er hat um 1471 in Merryfield, Devon, England Elizabeth Stucley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. April 1502 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in West Worlington, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Stucley circa 1471, nel Merryfield, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1502, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a West Worlington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wadhamが1429年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir John Wadham IIIは28歳，母Elizabeth Pophamは20歳であった。約1471年にイギリスデボンメリフィールドでElizabeth Stucleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年4月20日に73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ウオルリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wadham(이)가 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wadham III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Popham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1471년 영국 데폰 머리필드에서 Elizabeth Stucley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 4월 20일 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wadham nasceu em 1429, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Wadham III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Popham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stucley aproximadamente 1471, em Merryfield, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1502, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.West Worlington, Devon, England, United: West Worlington, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wadham родился в 1429 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Wadham III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Popham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stucley около 1471 г. в местности миррифиелд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 апреля 1502 г. в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности вест ворлингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Stucley aproximadamente 1471, en Merryfield, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1502, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
